name: app-live-debug
description: Bridge between Helios app and Cursor for live debugging: receive prompts via local API, copy to clipboard, and work with .cursor/tickets.json

commands.title: App Live Debug : Copier le prompt en attente
App Live Debug : Choisir un ticket pour Composer

appLiveDebug.serverPort.description: Port for the local HTTP server that receives prompts from Helios.

appLiveDebug.useHeadlessAgent.description: Run Cursor CLI agent in headless mode (agent -p) instead of opening Composer. Requires Cursor CLI installed and CURSOR_API_KEY set.

appLiveDebug.agentAllowFileChanges.description: When using headless agent, allow it to modify files (--force). If false, agent only suggests changes.

appLiveDebug.agentModel.description: Model for the headless agent (e.g. "auto", "gpt-5.2", "sonnet-4.5-thinking"). Use "auto" for automatic model selection. Run `agent models` to list options.

appLiveDebug.cursorApiKey.description: Cursor API key for headless agent. When set, overrides CURSOR_API_KEY env var. Get a key in Cursor Settings → Cursor CLI. Leave empty to use the environment variable.

appLiveDebug.agentPath.description: Full path to the Cursor CLI 'agent' executable. Use this if 'agent' is not in PATH when the extension runs (e.g. on Windows). In a terminal run 'where agent' (Windows) or 'which agent' (Mac/Linux) to get the path. Leave empty to use 'agent' from PATH.

enum: Ask each time (may block when run from extension)
enumDescriptions: Trust the workspace and run without prompting. Passes --trust to the agent. Use this when running from Helios or from the extension.
Trust without any confirmation. Passes --yolo to the agent.
Do not pass a trust flag; the agent may show "Workspace Trust Required" and block in headless mode.
appLiveDebug.agentWorkspaceTrust.description: How the Cursor CLI agent should handle workspace trust. Required for non-interactive runs; choose "Trust workspace" to avoid the "Workspace Trust Required" prompt.
